jin_color.description: Allows the model to update the JIN runtime avatar center point color and its subtle glow for the current live session.
rules: Use JIN_COLOR only to update the live JIN avatar center point color and its subtle glow.
When a visible answer is needed, place JIN_COLOR after the normal user-facing response instead of in a separate reasoning or planning block.
The payload must be a hex color with optional leading # and exactly 3 or 6 hex characters.
Invalid JIN_COLOR payloads are ignored by runtime and must not be retried blindly.
Multiple JIN_COLOR markers may be emitted in one response
